title: Common Sword applies Atk plus four while equipped

plan.title: Common Sword applies Atk plus four while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Common Sword to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed Atk bonus in battle damage.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Atk bonus comes only from Common Sword.

steps: Player 1 plays Common Sword and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +4 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the Atk bonus applies only while Common Sword remains equipped.
riskNotes: Atk is verified through resolved battle damage.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Common Sword Atk equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
